title: Patch console worker Dockerfile guard and validate locally
description: Replace stale MCP path checks with current runtime module checks and run local docker build verification.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched Dockerfile guard to current execute_tactus-era files: MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py, MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/_item_helpers.py, and MCP/server.py. Updated docker context test assertions accordingly. Validation: pytest dashboard/amplify/functions/consoleRunWorker/test_docker_context.py passed (2 tests).
